prompt_logic: Read-only independent plan review before implementation.
Look only for P0/P1 blockers in split boundary, helper/import coupling, test-name parity, manifest evidence, focused gate coverage, and below-500 feasibility.
Return DS_PLAN_PASS when no blockers are found; otherwise list blockers and the minimal plan repair.
review_summary: The planned root/reviewer-recovery/provider-health split accounts for all 27 current test names.

Helper and import dependencies are local to the planned shards: projectStatus can be duplicated, readJson is needed only by root and reviewer-recovery, and smokeNeedsEvent remains provider-health-only.
Focused gates are sufficient for a pure test split, with full npm test reserved for final validation.
Estimated file sizes are comfortably below 500 lines: root about 330 lines, reviewer-recovery about 410 lines, provider-health about 140 lines.
